faqs.q: How does the {trialDays}-day free trial work?
faqs.a: Sign up and get full platform access for {trialDays} days. No credit card required. When your trial ends, choose a plan that fits your team to keep your workspace active.

faqs.q: Can I use my own domain?
faqs.a: Yes. Every workspace includes a dedicated subdomain (e.g. nova.helpefi.com). On Enterprise plans, connect your own domain (e.g. support.yourcompany.com) from Settings → Custom domain — add the DNS records we provide, verify ownership, and optionally redirect visitors from your platform subdomain to your branded URL.
Email (inbound webhook, IMAP, and OAuth), live chat widget, SMS via Twilio, and a branded customer portal. All channels create tickets in the same shared inbox with multi-brand routing.

Service Desk is an optional paid add-on for any paid plan. It adds ITIL-style workflows on top of your existing tickets: type queues for incidents, requests, changes, and problems; catalog and change approvals; change calendar with CAB; problem records with linked incidents; and major incident war rooms with post-incident review.
Yes. A REST API covers authentication, tickets, contacts, service desk records, knowledge base, and billing snapshots — plus OpenAPI documentation for custom integrations and internal tooling.

Enterprise plans include SAML and OIDC single sign-on. Configure your identity provider in Settings → Security and agents sign in with your corporate credentials alongside optional two-factor authentication.

faqs.q: How does pricing work after the trial?
faqs.a: Plans are based on team size (agents) and monthly ticket volume. Professional includes automation, SLA, service catalog, and live chat. Enterprise adds AI, integrations, assets, SSO, and custom domain. AI Copilot, Integrations, Service Desk ITSM, and data residency add-ons (BYO database and storage) are optional monthly add-ons on any paid plan. Upgrade anytime from your workspace billing settings.

faqs.q: Can we host workspace data in our own cloud?
faqs.a: Yes. On any paid plan, add Bring Your Own Database (MySQL on RDS, Aurora, or self-hosted) and/or Bring Your Own Storage (AWS S3 or Cloudflare R2). Configure credentials in Settings → Data residency, test the connection, and we migrate existing data automatically. Use the same region as your workspace for best performance. A small amount of control-plane metadata stays on helpefi — see our data residency page for details.

faqs.q: Is BYO available on the free trial?
faqs.a: Data residency add-ons require a paid subscription. Start your trial on a paid plan tier, then enable BYO database or storage from billing add-ons before configuring your external resources.
Export tickets and contacts via CSV, or use the API to import data programmatically. Our unified inbox and service catalog make it straightforward to ramp without losing context.

privacy.hero_subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how Helpefi collects, uses, shares, and protects personal information when you visit our website, create an account, or use our helpdesk platform.
privacy.effective_date: Effective date: June 13, 2026 · Last updated: June 13, 2026

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: Helpefi ("Helpefi," "we," "us," or "our") provides cloud-based customer support and IT service management software. This Privacy Policy applies to visitors of helpefi.com, trial users, paying customers, and authorized users of Helpefi workspaces.
paragraphs: If you use Helpefi on behalf of an organization, that organization is the controller of most data processed in its workspace. Helpefi processes that data as a service provider according to your organization's instructions and our agreement with you.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
sections.body: We collect information in three broad categories: information you provide, information generated through use of the service, and information collected automatically.

sections.title: 2.1 Account and registration information
items: Name, email address, job title, and organization name
Workspace subdomain, billing details, and subscription plan selections
Authentication credentials and security settings such as two-factor authentication
Communications with us, including support requests and sales inquiries

sections.title: 2.2 Workspace and customer support data
sections.body: When you use Helpefi, you and your authorized users may submit data into your workspace. Depending on how you configure the platform, this may include:
items: Support tickets, chat transcripts, SMS messages, and email content
Contact and organization records for your customers or employees
Knowledge base articles, attachments, internal notes, and macros
Service catalog requests, approvals, and ITSM records
Integration data synced from third-party tools you connect
paragraphs: You control what data is submitted to your workspace. You are responsible for providing appropriate notices to your end users and obtaining any required consents.

sections.title: 2.3 Usage, device, and log data
items: IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and operating system
Pages viewed, features used, timestamps, and referral URLs on our marketing site
Application logs, error reports, performance metrics, and security audit events
Cookie and similar technology data as described below

sections.title: 2.4 Payment information
sections.body: Subscription payments are processed by our payment partners. We receive billing status, transaction identifiers, and limited payment metadata, but we do not store full payment card numbers on our servers.

sections.title: 3. How we use information
sections.body: We use personal information to operate, secure, and improve Helpefi, including to:
items: Create and administer accounts, workspaces, and user access
Provide ticketing, chat, knowledge base, automation, AI, and ITSM features
Process subscriptions, invoices, trials, and account notifications
Monitor service performance, troubleshoot issues, and prevent fraud or abuse
Respond to support requests and communicate product updates
Analyze aggregated usage to improve reliability, usability, and features
Comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service

sections.title: 4. AI and automated processing
sections.body: Helpefi offers optional AI capabilities such as reply suggestions, semantic search, and deflection. When enabled, content from your workspace may be processed to generate outputs for your users.
paragraphs: We do not use your workspace content to train public or third-party foundation models for general purposes. AI features are provided to deliver functionality within your account.
You are responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before sending it to customers or relying on it for business decisions.

sections.title: 5. Legal bases for processing (EEA, UK, and Switzerland)
sections.body: Where applicable data protection law requires a legal basis, we rely on one or more of the following:
items: Performance of a contract with you or your organization
Legitimate interests in operating, securing, and improving the service, balanced against your rights
Compliance with legal obligations
Consent, where required, such as for certain marketing cookies or optional communications

sections.title: 6. How we share information
sections.body: We do not sell personal information. We may share information only as described below:
items: Service providers and subprocessors that help us host infrastructure, send email, process payments, provide analytics, or deliver customer support tools
Integration partners you choose to connect to your workspace
Professional advisers, auditors, or authorities when required by law or to protect rights and safety
Successors in connection with a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, subject to this Privacy Policy

sections.title: 7. International data transfers
sections.body: Helpefi may process and store information in countries other than where you are located. Where required, we implement appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent mechanisms for cross-border transfers.

sections.title: 8. Data retention
sections.body: We retain information for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
paragraphs: Workspace data is retained according to your subscription and workspace settings. After account termination, we may delete or anonymize data within a reasonable period unless law requires longer retention.
Marketing site analytics and security logs are retained for limited periods consistent with operational needs.

sections.title: 9. Security
sections.body: We implement administrative, technical, and organizational measures designed to protect personal information, including access controls, encryption in transit, tenant isolation, audit logging, and regular monitoring.
paragraphs: No method of transmission or storage is completely secure. You are responsible for safeguarding credentials and configuring roles and permissions within your workspace.

sections.title: 10. Your rights and choices
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information, and to data portability or withdrawal of consent.
paragraphs: Workspace end users should contact their organization first, because the organization typically controls data in the workspace.
To exercise rights relating to your Helpefi account or this website, email hello{'@'}helpefi.com. We may need to verify your identity before responding.
You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.title: 11. Cookies and analytics
sections.body: Our marketing website may use cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality, preferences, and analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
paragraphs: If we use analytics tools such as Google Analytics, those providers may collect information about your interactions with our site according to their own policies.

sections.title: 12. Children's privacy
sections.body: Helpefi is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us information, contact hello{'@'}helpefi.com and we will take appropriate steps.

sections.title: 13. Changes to this Privacy Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If changes are material, we will provide notice by updating the effective date on this page or through other reasonable means. Continued use of Helpefi after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.title: 14. Contact us
sections.body: For privacy questions, data subject requests, or security reports, contact us at hello{'@'}helpefi.com.

ai-helpdesk-software-guide.title: How to choose AI helpdesk software in 2026
ai-helpdesk-software-guide.excerpt: A practical guide to evaluating AI customer support tools — deflection, Copilot, security, and total cost of ownership.
body_paragraphs: AI helpdesk software has moved from novelty to expectation. Support leaders now evaluate platforms on how well AI reduces handle time, deflects repetitive tickets, and keeps agents in control.
Start with outcomes: measure what percentage of tickets can be deflected with your existing knowledge base, and how much agent time Copilot saves on draft replies.
Look for semantic search across articles and past tickets, not just keyword matching. The best AI customer support tools ground answers in your approved content.
Security matters. Confirm data retention policies, whether models train on your tickets, and how SSO and audit logs fit your compliance requirements.

Finally, compare total cost: base plan, AI add-ons, per-seat pricing, and whether ITSM or multi-brand support requires a separate product. Helpefi combines helpdesk, AI, and optional Service Desk in one platform with transparent pricing.
